_comment: Spec for data_qa.hips_treasury: the PRE-TREASURY CMZ HiPS.
Extends the existing pre-treasury CMZ imagery (the survey fields observed
BEFORE the 10678 GC Treasury program): sgrb2 (5365), sgrc (4147), sickle
(3958), ....  These fields stay OUT of the 10678-only treasury HiPS
sgrb2 paths are real, verified 2026-07-21.  sgrc/sickle are placeholders:
no clear-*-merged_i2d.fits science mosaics existed for their F212N/F480M
pipeline dirs at that date; fill them in (TODO) when the mosaics land.
sickle has no F212N: per user decision its BLUE band is F210M ('blue_band'
overrides the F212N member tag; the mosaic still folds into the F212N
'root' is a LOCAL staging tree; publish it to the server with

fields.name: sickle
fields.f212n_i2d: TODO:/orange/adamginsburg/jwst/sickle/F210M/pipeline/jw03958-o007_t001_nircam_clear-f210m-merged_i2d.fits <F210M is sickle's blue band (no F212N); verify mosaic before use>
fields.long_i2d: TODO:/orange/adamginsburg/jwst/sickle/F480M/pipeline/<f480m-merged_i2d.fits not yet built; only mergedcat model/residual i2ds exist>
